entities.name: DROUGHT

entities.description: A location-specific environmental factor that influences yield losses due to drought

entities.description: A physiological process in groundnut affected by water deficits

entities.description: A physiological process in groundnut affected by water deficits

entities.description: The process of evaluating groundnut for drought tolerance in the field
